title: Simplomeris Verhoeff 1936
author: Wesener, Thomas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Synonymization of  Simplomeris  under  Glomeris .   Aside from their telopods, there is little support for a subfamily Haploglomerinae (e.g. Oeyen & Wesener 2015; 2018). Based on the COI barcoding data,  S. montivaga  is clearly another local endemic of the  G. klugii  species-group. Nevertheless, given the unique telopods of  Simplomeris  and the still limited (Oeyen & Wesener 2018) morphological and genetical knowledge of  Glomeris  and related genera, it is probably better to keep the genus  Simplomeris  as a valid genus until more data becomes available.
steps_raw: Synonymization of  Simplomeris  under  Glomeris .   Aside from their telopods, there is little support for a subfamily Haploglomerinae (e.g. Oeyen & Wesener 2015; 2018). Based on the COI barcoding data,  S. montivaga  is clearly another local endemic of the  G. klugii  species-group. Nevertheless, given the unique telopods of  Simplomeris  and the still limited (Oeyen & Wesener 2018) morphological and genetical knowledge of  Glomeris  and related genera, it is probably better to keep the genus  Simplomeris  as a valid genus until more data becomes available.
